'''Raw Farm Meat''' is a resource item.

==Products==
{{Uses material list|Raw Farm Meat}}

==Item sources==
{{Drop sources list|Raw Farm Meat}}

==Journal==
{{Journal entry|
This dense meat is a sturdy meal when prepared properly. It comes from larger animals who are far less willing to give it up than their smaller kin, making it a well deserved delicacy. 
}}
